name: ChkStart_LINRespErrorSignal
title: ChkStart_LINRespErrorSignal
syntax: dword ChkStart_LINRespErrorSignal ( Node ObservedNode, char[] CaplCallback);
description: Checks the LIN Response_Error signal for a specified LIN Slave node or for all LIN nodes.
An event will be generated, if the Response_Error signal value changes from FALSE (0) to TRUE (1).
J2602 specific: Bit 7 of Status Byte serves as Response_Error signal.

parameters.name: ObservedNode
parameters.description: Node to be checked.Only Slave nodes are allowed.

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
